 // Helper to convert hh:mm:ss,ms to seconds
 export function timeToSeconds(timeStr: string): number {
   const [hms, ms] = timeStr.split(",");
   const [h, m, s] = hms.split(":").map(Number);
-  return h * 3600 + m * 60 + s + (parseInt(ms || "0", 10) / 1000);

 }
